items.title: Sources, console and debugger: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? The console is only for printing and cannot alter application behavior.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Treat DevTools as an observation environment that can also mutate state; verify changes in source and tests.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Treat DevTools as an observation environment that can also mutate state; verify changes in source and tests.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
